times.name: Morning
times.lighting: soft golden sunrise glow, warm gentle light, fresh warm highlights, subtle long shadows

times.name: Afternoon
times.lighting: hazy neutral daylight, soft overhead glow, gently faded natural colors, muted short shadows

times.name: Evening
times.lighting: warm golden hour sunset glow, soft orange and pink washes, long blurred shadows, nostalgic warmth

times.name: Night
times.lighting: true nighttime, deep navy sky, moonlit blue shadows, faint stars, low sleepy glow

weathers.name: Clear Sky
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: happily basking with ears perked up, eyes squinting in bliss, sunbeams around, tail wagging gently

weathers.name: Mainly Clear
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: smiling while looking up at the sun, relaxed sitting pose, tongue slightly out

weathers.name: Partly Cloudy
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: curiously tilting head at fluffy clouds, gentle alert expression, ears forward

weathers.name: Overcast
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: slightly squinting happily at the gray sky, calm content expression, tail gently wagging

weathers.name: Fog
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: mysteriously alert in soft fog, bright eyes shining through mist, nose twitching curiously

weathers.name: Depositing Rime Fog
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: cozy in frosty mist with tiny ice crystals on fur, breath visible in cold air

weathers.name: Light Drizzle
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: shaking off tiny raindrops playfully, delighted grin, water droplets flying from coat

weathers.name: Moderate Drizzle
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: happily trotting through rain with tail up, wet but joyful, splashing in tiny puddles

weathers.name: Dense Drizzle
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: tucked under a wide leaf while thick drizzles fall, cheerful alert eyes, nose peeking out

weathers.name: Light Freezing Drizzle
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: carefully stepping on lightly glazed ground, bundled with a tiny scarf, determined expression

weathers.name: Dense Freezing Drizzle
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: snuggled under a mushroom cap as icy droplets sparkle, brave alert smile, ears perked

weathers.name: Slight Rain
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: shaking off tiny raindrops playfully, delighted grin, water droplets flying from coat

weathers.name: Moderate Rain
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: happily trotting through rain with tail up, wet but joyful, splashing in tiny puddles

weathers.name: Heavy Rain
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: tucked under a large mushroom or leaf, peeking out with big excited eyes, tail wagging

weathers.name: Light Freezing Rain
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: walking carefully over softly glazed ice patches, rosy cheeks and determined grin, paws careful

weathers.name: Heavy Freezing Rain
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: huddled warmly beneath a sturdy umbrella, icy raindrops sparkling around, brave expression

weathers.name: Slight Rain Showers
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: jumping between sun patches and raindrops, playful hop, ears flopping joyfully

weathers.name: Moderate Rain Showers
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: spinning happily in passing showers, paws stretched wide, shaking water from coat

weathers.name: Violent Rain Showers
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: bracing playfully against sudden downpours, eyes bright with excitement, tail high

weathers.name: Slight Snow Fall
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: catching snowflakes on nose, wearing tiny scarf, joyful wonder, tail wagging

weathers.name: Moderate Snow Fall
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: rolling happily in snow, building mini snow pile or just frolicking, ears perked up

weathers.name: Heavy Snow Fall
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: bundled cozy (tiny scarf and hat), snow piling on fur, bright happy eyes

weathers.name: Snow Grains
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: peering curiously at tiny icy pellets, playful and fascinated, head tilted

weathers.name: Slight Snow Showers
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: hopping through short snowy bursts, scarf fluttering, joyful energetic bounce

weathers.name: Heavy Snow Showers
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: ducking into fluffy drifts between intense snowy bursts, still smiling, tail wagging

weathers.name: Thunderstorm
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: slightly alert but still smiling bravely, ears perked forward, tiny lightning in background

weathers.name: Thunderstorm with Slight Hail
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: wearing tiny goggles while little hail taps around, bold grin, standing firm

weathers.name: Thunderstorm with Heavy Hail
weathers.actionExpressionAccessory: sheltering under a sturdy leaf as bigger hail bounces nearby, courageous alert smile
